creator: groofy@unicall.be
text:
I installed it perfectly @ work, but @home, this problem....
I used install.bat, (after putting a rem on emm386 in the config.sys) and it began detecting the hardware, but suddenly stops after a while, i tryed to boot from the floppy, but obviousely that didn't work either.....i work with all supported hardware components, but i can't even get in the installation menu....
can someone please help me out? I really want to run this at home too...:( thanks
